LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF ROBERT MENEFEE'S, INDIVIDUALLY AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED, UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR VOLUNTARY DISMISSAL IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF ROBERT DWAYNE MENEFEE'S INDIVIDUAL PAGA CLAIMS ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE REPRESENTATIVE PAGA CLAIMS ARE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/CVA)

Motion And Notice Of Motion For Voluntary Dismissal
Off Calendar May-06-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Matter on the Law & Motion/Discovery Calendar for Monday, May 5, 2025, line 3,

PLAINTIFF ROBERT MENEFEE'S, INDIVIDUALLY AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED, Motion For Voluntary Dismissal.

The unopposed motion for dismissal is granted. Plaintiff Robert Dwayne Menefee's individual PAGA claims are dismissed with prejudice. The representative PAGA claims are dismissed without prejudice.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
